reference: Hi dear, if black patches appear on their own, it is called melasma. If they occur after acne, it is called post-acne pigmentation. The first condition is a bit difficult to treat, but post-acne pigmentation can be treated easily. Now, the main culprit here is sunlight. However, since you have an acne problem, you cannot use a normal sunscreen as it tends to be oily. Therefore, I suggest you use Suncote. It is a water-based sunscreen and very effective. Thank you.
